title: Publish-vote web: live event delivery design
summary: Specifies how the web client delivers live publish-vote events: refetch-on-event (Approach B) rather than client-side tally reconstruction, per ADR holomush-o8gx8's snapshot-read + live-event split. Defines observer vs participant UX visibility rules and client-side wiring at ingestEvent, with no host/proto/manifest changes required.
